raw.message: Ein Sturm braut sich zusammen. Tägliche Phase-1-Turniere inkl. Preisgeldränge bis 10. Mai.

hook.summary: Announcement of the 15th anniversary Sunday Storm tournament with a €425,000 guarantee.
hook.visual_action: Static background with poker elements like cards and chips under a lightning sky, with a central logo appearing.

scene_flow: Tournament anniversary announcement with prize pool details.
Display of tournament benefits including more flights and faster payouts.
Final screen announcing that Phase 1 tournaments are currently live.
on_screen_text: Ab 18 Jahre. Lizenziert in Deutschland. Glücksspiel kann süchtig machen. Infos und Hilfe unter buwei.de
audience_proxy: German-speaking poker players looking for high-value, low-entry tournaments.
